sections.paragraph:
fut. יִסְלַח to pardon, forgive; followed by a dat., Exo 34:9 1Ki 8:34, 36 1Ki 8:36, 39 1Ki 8:39. (Chald. Zab. id.; Eth. with the letters transposed, ተሠሀለ፡ to be merciful, propitious, to pardon; comp. Arab. سهل to shew oneself gentle. The primary idea seems to be that of lightness, lifting up; compare סָלָא, סָלָה).

Niphal, to be forgiven (used of sin), Lev 4:20, 26 , 31 5:10 , 13 . Hence-
